sources.title: 3 Strangers | 2024 Romance Drama Movie | Road Trip Movie
sources.description:
When three strangers from different backgrounds are forced to go on a business road trip together, no one is happy about the assignment. With three cities, three days, three nights, and miles of endless road in front of them, they’ll come face-to-face with their own personal challenges and prejudice to discover that life isn’t about the destination, it’s about the journey.

2024.  Stars: Bella Martin, Bethany Sharp, Karla Dansereau, Tara Hayes

metadata.Plot: In the "Strangers" finale, survivors face new threats from masked strangers. Secrets emerge, jeopardizing their lives as the line between reality and peril blurs in their battle for survival.
